statement: Memory-system recall at 1 degrades monotonically with session depth rather than failing categorically, such that at least one subject exceeds 0.80 mean recall at 1 at depth 4 while falling below it at depth 10, making the choice of 10-session depth rather than memory capability the load-bearing assumption in the primary claim
falsification_criteria: If no subject exceeds mean recall@1 >= 0.80 at depth d=4 (N>=10 runs), this claim is falsified: the failure is present even at shallow depth and is not a depth artifact.
